title: Minecraft Lighting reimagined
body:
## Intro
This is a minecraft mod that adds stunning visuals to minecraft. It is recommended to use a modern gpu(amd or nvidia). Integrated graphics are highly not recommended.
### Compatibility
You shouldn't use this mod-pack with any other additional mods or other shader-packs. Only datapacks and recourse packs. If you are, then disable the photonics mod. Need more help? Click [here](https://github.com/PhantomPheonixCreations/Minecraft-LR)!

### Issues
If you encounter issues, they might be caushed by the photonics or the continuity mod.You can try using alternative platforms or disabling some mods. Need more help? Click [here](https://github.com/PhantomPheonixCreations/Minecraft-LR)!

### Performace
This mod is optimised well,however for mid-range and low-range computers its reccomended to have Vsync turned off, render distance at 6-12, simulation distance at 5-6. Fps capped at 20-60.
for higher refresh rate monitors consider either capping the fps higher or changing the refresh rate. This mod was designed for single player, but it has some multiplayer mods on, consider turning off any of those for better speeds when loading up minecraft to play singleplayer.

## **IMPORTANT**
This mod-pack can overheat your pc(very rare) if not used properly so use it at your own risk(what could go wrong?).
